name: WTTJ Job Alerts → Google Sheets v3 (Hybrid)

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ operationName: 'JobRecommendations', variables: { ignoreSubfunctions: false }, query: 'query JobRecommendations($themeId: ThemeId, $preferredSectorId: ID, $ignoreSubfunctions: Boolean) { currentUser { id jobRecommendations(themeId: $themeId, preferredSectorId: $preferredSectorId, ignoreSubfunctions: $ignoreSubfunctions) { id job { id externalId title subtitle company { id name } } } } }' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ operationName: 'JobDetails', variables: { externalId: $json.externalId, currency: 'USD' }, query: 'query JobDetails($externalId: ID!, $currency: Currency!) { publicJob(externalId: $externalId) { id externalId title subtitle salaryRange { minAmount maxAmount currency } remoteOnly formattedLocationPreferences(groupRemote: true) { name matchesUserPreference } function { value } subFunction { value } minYearsExperienceRequired maxYearsExperienceRequired technologiesUsed { value } originalUrl insertedAt validUntil company { name shortDescription numberEmployees size { value } sectorTags { value } totalFunding(currency: $currency) { amount currency } } } }' }) }}
